title: acalypha ceraceopunctata
intro: Acalypha ceraceopunctata, also known as the punctured calotrope, is a plant species in the family Euphorbiaceae. It is an annual or perennial herb with medicinal properties, traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The plant's leaves and roots contain bioactive compounds that have anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which contribute to its health benefits, including wound healing, fever reduction, and relief from respiratory issues. Acalypha ceraceopunctata can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions for medicinal purposes.
